---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: '[FEATURE] Brief description'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Describe the Problem

What's the current limitation or gap? What would make your workflow easier?

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Describe your ideal experience.

## Alternative Approaches

Have you considered other ways to solve this problem?

## Use Case

Give a real example of when you'd use this feature.

## Acceptance Criteria

What would make this feature complete and useful?

---

**Examples**:
- Add support for [tool/database]
- Improve error messages when [situation]
- Add new methodological filter for [study type]
